module.name: no-process-env-outside-config
module.description: Disallow process.env reads outside configuration modules; import typed config instead.

scenarios.name: should allow process env in config files
scenarios.given: a file named config.ts that reads process.env.NODE_ENV
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the member expression

scenarios.name: should allow process env in config directories
scenarios.given: a file under a /config/ directory that reads process.env
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the member expression

scenarios.name: should disallow process env property reads in app code
scenarios.given: a non-config file that reads process.env.NODE_ENV
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the inner process.env member expression

scenarios.name: should disallow computed process env reads outside config
scenarios.given: a non-config file that reads process["env"]
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the member expression
